ItacPersonItem.Notes: Historian, poet, playwright. Joined the Ricovrati in 1678. His portrait is taken from Delle ode del signor Enrico Altani conte di Salvarolo Parte prima .. (Venetia, Zattoni, 1680)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
